text: Bitcoin and Ethereum are both gaining ground with modest 24h moves (+2.9% and +3.1% respectively), suggesting cautious buying interest in the majors despite extreme fear readings. Bitcoin dominance at 55.6% and $82B in daily volume indicate steady participation without euphoria or panic capitulation. The Fear & Greed index at 11 signals persistent pessimism, yet the positive price action and stable volume suggest some traders are testing lows rather than fleeing outright.
